case_title: IBBGIE WHITE AL-SHAMMA VS. CHRIATIAN FRIGERIO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REPLY IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF IBBGIE WHITE AL-SHAMMA FILED BY DEFENDANT FRIGERIO, CHRISTIAN
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KOZUBAL, JOANNA SUBSTITUTED FOR KEITH, BRENDA CRUZ AS ATTORNEY FOR AL-SHAMMA, IBBGIE WHITE TGRUSTEE OF THE AL-SHAMMA FAMILY TRUST
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY KOZUBAL, JOANNA

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN FRIGERIO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES UNLAWFUL DETAINER BASED ON NOTICE TO QUIT. WHETHER BREACH WAS CURABLE IS AN ISSUE OF FACT. SFRO 37.9(A)(2) READ IN LIGHT OF CCP 1611(3) ALSO DOES NOT REQUIRE AN OPPORTUNITY TO CURE WHEN CCP 1161(3) DOES NOT PROVIDE FOR SUCH OPPORTUNITY. ORDER FOR THE SAME SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: N. WONG; DEPT.501; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Atty. Cameron Boucher, (415)626-6494, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party Ibbgie White Al-Shamma is present. No apperance by Defendant.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN FRIGERIO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer based on Notice to Quit. Whether breach was curable is an issue of fact. SFRO 37.9(a)(2) read in light of CCP 1611(3) also does not require an opportunity to cure when CCP 1161(3) does not provide for such opportunity. Order for the same signed in open court.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Dept.501; Not Reported
